workshoptitle: Data Fundamentals for AI Application Development

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Connect and Explore the Prism Dataset
tutorials.description: Configure credentials, connect to Oracle AI Database 26ai, and explore Prism data structures.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Generate In-Database Vector Embeddings
tutorials.description: Run the embedding pipeline and create the HNSW vector index.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Combine Relational, JSON, Graph, and Vector in One Query
tutorials.description: Execute multimodel SQL and graph traversal with semantic search context.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Optional Hybrid Vector Search
tutorials.description: Build a hybrid index and compare vector, text, UNION, and INTERSECT modes.
